nutrition.emptyData: Please paste or enter nutrition data.
nutrition.importFormatInfo: Paste or type your meal log (e.g. from a note or app). AI will parse it and suggest entries.
nutrition.importInstructions: Paste your nutrition data below. Supported: free text, bullet lists, or structured logs.
nutrition.mealDescriptionPlaceholder: e.g. Oatmeal with banana, 2 eggs, coffee with milk
nutrition.processingFailed: Could not process the data. Please check the format and try again.
nutrition.retrospectiveExample: e.g. Breakfast: oatmeal and banana. Lunch: chicken salad. Dinner: pasta with vegetables.
nutrition.retrospectiveInstructions: Describe what you ate that day in your own words. AI will estimate portions and nutrients.
nutrition.tryAICameraDesc: Scan your meal for instant identification

checkin.title: Weekly Check-in
checkin.summary: You aimed for {{targetKcal}} kcal/day, but averaged {{actualKcal}} kcal/day. You completed {{workouts}} workouts.
checkin.insufficientData: You have logged weight less than 4 times this week. Averages may be less accurate.

manageFoodData.title: Nutrition Log
manageFoodData.noLogsDesc: Start tracking your meals to see them here
manageFoodData.duplicateEntryDesc: Create a copy of this entry
